summary: This Excel spreadsheet lists 12 user needs for the AI phone agent, categorized by User, Regulatory, and Business groups. It specifies requirements for usability, data privacy compliance (GDPR/NHS), and system reliability. The document supports CE Marking and regulatory adherence for the elderly care product.
